Article Title: Watch: Delhi CM Rekha Gupta greeted with 'AQI' chants at Messi event; opposition slams government over smog
Article Text:
.

'Delhi NOT Most Polluted': Doctor's Shocking Reveal On Toxic Monster; And How To Fight Back

Delhi Chief Minister Rekha Gupta faced chants of 'AQI, AQI' from the crowd while welcoming football star Lionel Messi at Arun Jaitley Stadium on Monday, as the city's Air Quality Index reached severe levels at 498 in the morning before settling at 427 by evening.The incident was captured in a viral video, prompting criticism from the Aam Aadmi Party over the city's deteriorating air quality."International Shame, Crowd for Messi shouts 'AQI, AQI' as soon as Delhi CM Rekha Gupta arrives," posted AAP's Delhi unit chief Saurabh Bharadwaj on X, sharing the video clip.The AAP criticised BJP governments at the Centre and in Delhi for their alleged inaction as toxic air affected Delhi-NCR and North India regions."In a country where everyone is talking about pollution, the prime minister is just silent on the issue," Bharadwaj stated.The Central Pollution Control Board reported that 27 monitoring stations across Delhi recorded 'severe' air quality on Monday, with Wazirpur recording the highest at 475.The dense smog affected visibility and daily activities, causing residents to take precautions like wearing masks during commutes.Delhi's air quality remained in the 'severe' zone for the third consecutive day, with haze obscuring the city's skyline.The Lionel Messi G.O.A.T. India Tour concluded successfully at the Arun Jaitley Stadium, following an earlier chaotic event in Kolkata on Saturday.
Article Summary: Delhi Chief Minister Rekha Gupta faced chants of 'AQI, AQI' from the crowd while welcoming football star Lionel Messi. The incident was captured in a viral video, prompting criticism from the Aam Aadmi Party over the city's deteriorating air quality. Delhi's Air Quality Index reached severe levels at 498 in the morning before settling at 427 by evening.

NEW DELHI: The Indian Premier League mini auction 2026 is set to kick off with 10 franchises vying for 77 players slots, operating under a combined spending purse of Rs 237.55 crore. The upcoming season is scheduled to begin on March 26, 2026, with the final scheduled on May 31.Kolkata Knight Riders enter the auction with the largest purse, among the ten teams, in the mini auction, Rs 64.3 crore, positioning them as a dominant force in shaping bidding trends. Chennai Super Kings also hold a sizeable budget, giving them considerable influence in player selections.Australian all-rounder Cameron Green is widely expected to attract the highest bid, while players like Venkatesh Iyer, Liam Livingstone, and Ravi Bishnoi are also likely to command significant attention from franchises.With ample funds at their disposal, teams are anticipated to aggressively target uncapped and emerging talent, potentially sparking intense bidding wars for promising youngsters. Strategic acquisitions during this auction could prove pivotal for franchises aiming to strengthen their squads ahead of the new season.Beyond individual player signings, the mini auction will play a crucial role in shaping team compositions and balancing competition among franchises.Smart investments could give teams a decisive edge when the tournament gets underway in March.Overall, the 2026 IPL mini auction promises to be a high-stakes, closely watched event, with franchises leveraging their financial power to secure both star players and rising talent in preparation for a fiercely contested season.The IPL 2026 auction is scheduled for Tuesday, December 16.This year’s auction takes place in Abu Dhabi, UAE.The auction will begin at 2:30 PM IST.The live telecast will be available on Star Sports Network.Fans can stream the auction live on the JioHotstar app and website.Kolkata Knight Riders (KKR) - Rs 64.3 crore (13 spots to fill)Chennai Super Kings (CSK) - Rs 43.4 crore (9 spots to fill)Sunrisers Hyderabad (SRH) - Rs 25.5 crore (10 spots to fill)Lucknow Super Giants (LSG) - Rs 22.95 crore (6 spots to fill)Delhi Capitals (DC) - Rs 21.8 crore (8 spots to fill)Royal Challengers Bengaluru (RCB) - Rs 16.4 crore (8 spots to fill)Rajasthan Royals (RR) - Rs 16.05 crore (9 spots to fill)Gujarat Titans (GT) - Rs 12.9 crore (5 spots to fill)Punjab Kings (PBKS) - Rs 11.5 crore (4 spots to fill)Mumbai Indians (MI) - Rs 2.75 crore (5 spots to fill)

The upcoming season is scheduled to begin on March 26, 2026, with the final scheduled on May 31. Kolkata Knight Riders enter the auction with the largest purse, among the ten teams, in the mini auction, Rs 64.3 crore.

Article Title: ‘AQI, AQI’ chants erupt as Lionel Messi welcomed in Delhi, crowd targets CM Rekha Gupta - Watch
Article Text:
Delhi Chief Minister Rekha Gupta shakes hands with footballer Lionel Messi (ANI Photo/Naveen Sharma)

Delhi’s worsening air quality cast a shadow over Lionel Messi ’s farewell appearance in India, as a section of the crowd at the Arun Jaitley Stadium voiced its anger at the political leadership even while welcoming the global football icon.As Chief Minister Rekha Gupta stepped onto the stage on Monday to receive Messi during the final leg of the GOAT India Tour, chants of “AQI, AQI” rang out from parts of the stands. The reaction came amid hazardous pollution levels in the national capital, with the Air Quality Index touching 498 in the morning before easing slightly to 427 by evening, remaining in the ‘severe’ category for the third consecutive day. Visibility across the city dropped sharply, with a thick haze obscuring the skyline.The chants contrasted sharply with the celebratory atmosphere inside the stadium, where nearly 25,000 fans had gathered to catch a glimpse of Messi. The Delhi leg marked the conclusion of a tour that had begun chaotically in Kolkata but ended on a more organised note in the capital. Spectators packed the stands, many wearing Argentina’s blue and white jersey with the iconic No. 10, while celebrities and dignitaries watched from inside the ground.Messi, speaking briefly in Spanish, thanked the crowd for the affection shown throughout his India visit. He described the experience as intense but unforgettable, saying the love he received exceeded expectations and promising that he would return to India someday, possibly to play a match.After arriving at the stadium, Messi walked around the field smiling, watched the 7x7 celebrity match conclude, and waved repeatedly to the crowd. Alongside Inter Miami teammates Luis Suarez and Rodrigo De Paul, he kicked footballs into the stands during a lap of honour and later felicitated the Minerva Academy football team. The reception was notably freer than in Kolkata, where heavy security and political entourages had limited fan interaction.The tightly scripted 30-minute programme revolved largely around Messi. He was joined on stage by Rekha Gupta, ICC chairman Jay Shah , DDCA president Rohan Jaitley and former India football captain Bhaichung Bhutia towards the end of the event.While Messi mania dominated the evening, the chants inside the stadium underlined a growing public frustration over Delhi’s air crisis, turning a celebratory sporting moment into a pointed reminder of the capital’s ongoing environmental emergency.
Article Summary: Delhi's worsening air quality cast a shadow over Lionel Messi’s farewell appearance in India. A section of the crowd at the Arun Jaitley Stadium voiced its anger at the political leadership even while welcoming the global football icon. The reaction came amid hazardous pollution levels in the national capital.

Article Title: ‘Cheetah hair’ ties suspect vehicle to Gwalior cub hit-and-run probe
Article Text: Bhopal: A tiny strand of ‘Cheetah hair', lodged in the crease of the car's front bumper, has apparently emerged as the most critical clue in unravelling the mystery behind the hit-and-run death of a Cheetah cub on the Agra-Mumbai National Highway in Gwalior on Dec 7.For nearly a week after the incident, the vehicle involved remained unidentified, with no eyewitnesses and no immediate trail to pick up on. The male cheetah cub, KGP-4, was killed around 6.15 am near Simariya Mod under the Ghatigaon police station limits, about 40 km from Gwalior, after being hit by a speeding vehicle while crossing the highway with its sibling.At the time, a monitoring team from Kuno National Park was tracking the cubs through satellite collars from roughly 300 metres away. The team rushed to the spot within minutes, secured the carcass and alerted senior officials. While the cub was crushed under the vehicle's wheels, its sibling, KGP-3, managed to escape.Senior forest and police officers, including the chief conservator of forest (CCF) in charge of Kuno National Park, divisional forest officers from Gwalior and Kuno, and local police personnel, reached the site.
Article Summary: The male cheetah cub, KGP-4, was killed around 6.15 am near Simariya Mod under the Ghatigaon police station limits, about 40 km from Gwalior. It was hit by a speeding vehicle while crossing the highway with its sibling. The vehicle involved remained unidentified, with no eyewitnesses and no immediate trail to pick up on.

Article Title: 'Anti-party activities': Congress expels ex-Odisha MLA; Mouqim had written to Sonia Gandhi over party leadership
Article Text:
Letter To Sonia Gandhi Costs Ex Odisha MLA Moquim Party Post As Congress Cites Anti Party Activities

What the letter said



Moquim’s past controversies



NEW DELHI: The Congress party on Monday expelled former MLA Mohammed Moquim from the party days after he wrote to Sonia Gandhi urging the removal of party president Mallikarjun Kharge on the grounds that “age is not on his side. ” Congress cited "anti-party activities" as the reason behind his expulsion, however, it refrained from specifying such acts."This is for the information of all concerned that AICC has approved the proposal for the expulsion of Sri Md. Moquim from the primary membership of the party, due to anti-party activities," the notice issued by Odisha Pradesh Congress Committee (OPCC) said.Moquim had written to Sonia, urging her that the party should consider bringing forward "young leaders", adding that the Grand Old Party was going through a "difficult phase"."I have written a letter to Sonia Gandhi stating that the party is going through a difficult phase and needs her advice and new leadership... Age is not on AICC President Mallikarjun Kharge's side... We should bring forward young leaders. I know that Sonia ji and the CWC members will definitely discuss this.... Nuapada by-elections were concerning," he had said.The 60-year-old received criticism for the letter as OPCC chief Bhakta Das went on to equate his remarks as one aligned with the BJP.“Those who challenge the party leadership should immediately join the BJP,” he said on Sunday.Addressed to Sonia Gandhi, Moquim’s letter pointed out party’s recent electoral defeats in Bihar, Delhi, Haryana, Maharashtra and Kashmir and blamed a "series of wrong decisions, misguided leadership choices"."The recent outcomes in Bihar, Delhi, Haryana, Maharashtra, and Kashmir, where our defeats were by staggering margins, are not just electoral setbacks; they reflect a deeper organisational disconnect," the letter said."A series of wrong decisions, misguided leadership choices, and the continued concentration of responsibility in the wrong hands have weakened the Party from within. Rather than correcting these errors, we appear to be repeating them and the consequences are now visible to the entire nation," the letter added.The letter further questioned whether the "responsibilities being entrusted to the right people"."Painful questions are being raised: Are decisions being made with seriousness? Are responsibilities being entrusted to the right people? Does the leadership fully grasp the gravity of this crisis, or are we allowing the Party's decline to continue unchecked, with decisions remaining in the wrong hands?" he questioned.The Bharatiya Janata Party was quick to react to the "internal rift" with Shehzad Poonawalla saying, "Team Priyanka vs team Rahul out in the open now Internal rift in Congress out! Senior Congress leader from Odisha Writes to Sonia Gandhi: Says Kharge Hatao ,Priyanka Lao;Hits out at state and central leadership Odisha leader Mohammed Moquim has questioned the leadership crisis nationally and called for deep structural, organisational and ideological renewal for the party’s revival. He notes a “deep and growing disconnect” between the Congress leadership and Indian youth, saying that under the current leadership of Mallikarjun Kharge, who is 83, the party has been unable to resonate with the youth."This was not Moquim’s first brush with controversy. He was suspended on July 15, 2023, for questioning Pattanaik’s leadership, a decision that was later withdrawn on January 23, 2024, ahead of the simultaneous Assembly and Lok Sabha elections.Earlier, he had received a show-cause notice for cross-voting in support of NDA presidential candidate Droupadi Murmu in July 2022. The former Barabati–Cuttack MLA, who was elected for the first time and whose seat is now held by his daughter Sofia Firdous, was disqualified from contesting the 2024 elections after being convicted in a state vigilance case on September 29, 2022.
Article Summary: Former Odisha MLA Mohammed Moquim has been expelled from the Congress party. Congress cited "anti-party activities" as the reason behind his expulsion. He wrote to Sonia Gandhi urging the removal of party president Mallikarjun Kharge on the grounds that “age is not on his side’

Article Title: Could Blake Lively make a surprise appearance with Travis Kelce in Taylor Swift’s Eras Tour documentary? Fan speculation heats up
Article Text:

Their enduring, private friendship holds deep emotional weight for viewers, who see a possible cameo as a personal affirmation of loyalty and continuity amidst Swift's monumental tour. The documentary's blend of performance and personal storytelling fuels this anticipation.

Why Blake Lively’s possible cameo carries emotional weight for fans

For years, Taylor Swift and Blake Lively have represented one of pop culture’s most enduring celebrity friendships, blending music, film, family, and quiet loyalty away from the spotlight. As Swift’s Eras Tour documentary continues to roll out on Disney+, fans are once again analyzing every frame for personal moments that reveal life behind the stadium lights.With additional episodes set to arrive later this month, online speculation has intensified around whether Lively might appear in unseen footage. The curiosity isn’t just about a cameo, it reflects a deeper fascination with how Swift’s inner circle fits into one of the most ambitious tours in modern music history. For longtime fans, even a brief glimpse could feel meaningful.The Eras Tour documentary is not just a concert film, it functions as a time capsule of Swift’s creative process, personal resilience, and trusted relationships during a career-defining moment. While the project already features collaborators, dancers, and close friends, Lively’s absence so far has stood out to fans who have followed the duo’s friendship for over a decade.Their bond has often unfolded quietly, through shared milestones rather than constant public appearances. That low-profile dynamic has only fueled curiosity, especially since Lively has remained largely out of the public eye in recent months amid a widely discussed legal dispute connected to a past film project.As a result, some fans see a potential documentary appearance as symbolic, not promotional, but personal.What also adds intrigue is timing. The remaining episodes are expected to spotlight more candid moments from Swift’s tour life, including downtime, private celebrations, and emotional checkpoints behind the scenes. If Lively does appear, it would likely be organic rather than staged, reinforcing the authenticity Swift has emphasized throughout the project.Beyond speculation, the conversation highlights something larger: the Eras Tour documentary has blurred the line between performance and personal storytelling. Fans aren’t only watching for vocals and choreography, they’re searching for quiet confirmations of loyalty, healing, and continuity amid massive success.Whether Lively ultimately appears or not, the attention underscores how invested audiences remain in Swift’s personal narrative. A brief moment, a background shot, or even an off-camera mention would be enough to spark discussion. For now, viewers are watching closely, convinced that if the friendship does surface, it will do so naturally, just like it always has.Also Read: Taylor Swift’s Eras Tour has a hidden Joe Alwyn connection amid her engagement to Travis Kelce

Article Text:

While the details are sourced from credible insights, it’s important to note that these are not confirmed moves or official statements. Readers are encouraged to take this analysis with a grain of salt and stay tuned for official updates as the offseason unfolds.)

Atlanta Braves exploring Corey Seager despite major roadblock

Who really wins this deal?

Atlanta Braves rumors are gaining serious traction as Atlanta continues to explore a blockbuster trade for Texas Rangers shortstop Corey Seager, a move that would instantly reshape the National League playoff picture. The two-time World Series MVP remains one of baseball’s most dangerous left-handed bats, and even preliminary interest from the Braves has ignited fan speculation across the league. While no deal is close, the combination of Atlanta’s glaring shortstop need and Texas’ willingness to listen on veterans has turned this into one of the most fascinating “what if” scenarios of the offseason.According to multiple reports from the Winter Meetings, the Atlanta Braves have checked in on Seager as they search for a long-term solution at shortstop following years of instability since Dansby Swanson’s departure. However, the biggest complication is structural rather than financial: Atlanta is on Corey Seager’s no-trade list, meaning any deal would require the star shortstop’s direct approval.That reality has kept discussions preliminary. Rangers GM Chris Young has publicly acknowledged openness to moving pieces as Texas adjusts payroll after dealing Marcus Semien, but there have been no substantial negotiations involving Seager’s contract, which still carries roughly $186 million over the next six seasons.Jeff Passan and other national insiders have framed Atlanta’s interest as exploratory, yet persistent.The Atlanta Braves’ motivation is clear. Atlanta’s shortstop production in 2025 ranked among the weakest of any contender, combining for just 1.1 fWAR with minimal power and on-base ability. Seager would immediately flip that weakness into a strength, giving the lineup another elite bat alongside Ronald Acuña Jr. and Matt Olson.Pundits have described Seager as a massive offensive upgrade over options like Mauricio Dubón, not only for his power but for his postseason résumé. His presence would allow Atlanta to stabilize the infield, either by keeping Seager at shortstop or shifting him to DH while adjusting Ozzie Albies defensively.While any proposal remains speculative, industry chatter has centered on a prospect-heavy return rather than elite, untouchable names. One scenario floated by analysts involves Atlanta sending mid-tier arms and depth pieces to Texas, paired with financial relief.Potential structure discussed by insiders includes:• Pitching prospects such as Hurston Waldrep and Dylan Dodd• Additional secondary pieces to balance value• Texas retaining $10–15 million annually to ease Seager’s $31 million AAVThe Rangers would gain controllable pitching for a retooling phase, while the Braves would absorb a superstar contract aligned with a win-now window. The largest hurdle remains Seager’s willingness to waive his no-trade clause, something considered unlikely but not impossible if competitive priorities outweigh geography.From the Texas Rangers’ perspective, moving Seager would signal a clear pivot. After an 81-81 season and mounting payroll pressure, shedding long-term salary while restocking a thinned farm system has appeal. Still, trading away a franchise face and postseason hero would be a tough sell internally and publicly.At 31, Seager’s durability has become part of the conversation, having missed significant time in recent seasons. Texas could choose to move early rather than risk decline, but replacing a hitter with a .289 career average and elite playoff production is no small task.The contrast between Seager and Atlanta’s recent shortstop output highlights why this rumor won’t fade quietly.Advanced metrics paint an even sharper picture. Seager’s .365 wOBA and 15.3 percent barrel rate dwarf Atlanta’s infield production, with projections suggesting 30-plus home run potential in Truist Park.• Proven MVP-caliber talent fills a major lineup hole• Left-handed power plays well against NL East pitching• Postseason experience strengthens October ceiling• Injury history over the past two seasons• $31 million AAV strains payroll flexibility• No-trade clause could halt talks entirely• Prospect infusion for a system needing depth• Long-term salary relief• Opportunity to reset roster timeline• Loss of a franchise cornerstone• Difficulty replacing elite offensive production• Fan backlash following recent payroll cutsIf Corey Seager were to approve a move, Atlanta would land one of the biggest trade prizes imaginable, instantly shifting the NL East balance of power and positioning themselves to challenge Philadelphia at the top of the division. For Texas, the return would help stabilize the future but at the cost of star power and identity.Alsi read: MLB trade rumors: Boston Red Sox might sign $116.5 million Arizona Diamondbacks superstar to bolster rotation in Winter Meetings For now, this remains a high-end hypothetical rather than an imminent blockbuster. Still, as long as the Braves are searching for answers at shortstop and the Rangers remain open to restructuring their roster, Corey Seager’s name will continue to hover over the offseason like a spark waiting for fuel.
Article Summary: Atlanta Braves are reportedly exploring a trade for Texas Rangers shortstop Corey Seager. The two-time World Series MVP remains one of baseball’s most dangerous left-handed bats. Seager would instantly reshape the National League playoff picture. The biggest complication is structural rather than financial: Atlanta is on his no-trade list.

Article Title: “I’m gonna miss him” – Dwyane Wade gets emotional in heartfelt tribute as LeBron James’ historic NBA career draws praise
Article Text:
Dwyane Wade & LeBron James. Image via: Imagn Images

Dwyane Wade reflects on LeBron James in Year 23





Dwyane Wade and LeBron James memories from the Heat era





The bond between Dwyane Wade and LeBron James has always been special. As James steps into Year 23, Wade no longer speaks as a former teammate alone. He speaks as a fan who understands what the league is slowly preparing to lose. Recently, Wade commented on James’ 23rd NBA season comes contemplating who shared championships, pressure, and history with James at the highest level.Wade’s words arrive at a time when every appearance by LeBron feels meaningful. The milestones keep coming, yet the uncertainty lingers. For Wade, that reality has shifted how he watches the game now. There is admiration, reflection, and a sense of time closing in on an era few believed possible.Speaking candidly, Dwyane Wade did not hide the emotion tied to watching James still perform at an elite level. His appreciation felt personal and honest.“I’m like you guys, I’m a fan. I know it’s like, ‘he’s old, he should retire’. But at the same time, I’m gonna miss him… He’s just taking these moments in, we don’t know when the last one is coming.”Wade’s praise for James is not a one time thing. Previously, in episode of Wy Network by Dwyane Wade, the Heat legend shared his candid thoughts.“I have the greatest body of work of anybody that’s ever put a Miami Heat jersey on,” Wade said.“If you wanna be honest, LeBron James is the greatest player to ever put a Miami Heat jersey on… I’m the greatest player in the history of the Miami Heat for the body of work I had wearing that jersey, but I’m not the greatest player to ever put on a Miami Heat jersey.”Dwyane Wade retired from the NBA in 2019 after 16 seasons, mostly with the Miami Heat. He admitted his burst was fading and the joy was gone, even as a Hall of Famer. Since retiring, Wade thrives as a businessman, media voice, and NBA owner, while proudly supporting his daughter Zaya.Wade recently revisited another iconic chapter with humor while recalling the famous Big Three introduction. His memory of that moment revealed both restraint and foresight.“Let’s run that tape who was it again. It’s one voice and look at the one in the middle laughing like young boy over here was talking… he was feeling the moment… look I look put my head down, look I put my head down, ‘I’m like hey man look now I’mma supportive teammate.'”“I’m my rubbing my knee I’m like ‘Oh I don’t know if I got that much… He trippin’, look I ain’t said a word… That was that supposed to have been a moment that was just for our fans and it should not have been the world should not have seen.”“That’s something that you say internal, you know what I mean? We going to win every year but really you know how hard it is to win one year. I don’t care what kind of talent you have so that’s why I was sitting there like oh my man don’t know yet.”“But he did go to the Finals 10 years in a row though. He damn sure didn’t like about how many opportunities. He almost did it, he ain’t lie… Listen, we went 4, he went 10.”In September this year, the 2025 Basketball Hall of Fame weekend carried special meaning for LeBron James and Dwyane Wade. While Wade was inducted in 2023 and James awaits retirement, both attended to honor the 2008 Team USA “Redeem Team.” The group’s induction marked a defining chapter in USA Basketball history. James and Wade shared a light moment before the ceremony, reflecting their long bond. The duo helped lead Team USA to Olympic gold in Beijing after the 2004 setback. That victory sparked a dominant run, with five straight Olympic gold medals since 2008. The Redeem Team featured stars like Kobe Bryant, Carmelo Anthony, and Dwight Howard. They defeated a strong Spain squad in a high-scoring gold medal game.LeBron James is not stopping despite recent injury setbacks. The King got back on his feet and made a strong comeback. So far, he has not shared any update on his retirement.Also Read: "The Kings are here": LeBron James & Jay-Z's courtside moment sends NBA fans into meltdown
Article Summary: Dwyane Wade reflects on LeBron James in Year 23 of his NBA career. The Miami Heat legend says he is a fan of James. Wade and James were part of the 2008 Team USA Olympic gold medal winning team. Wade retired from the NBA in 2019 after 16 seasons with the Heat.

Article Title: Good news for Chiefs and fans: Patrick Mahomes ACL tear spares other ligaments, quick recovery possible
Article Text:
(Image via Getty)

Patrick Mahomes ACL update: MRI results bring encouraging news for 2025 season recovery





“As long as the surgery goes well, as expected, then I would expect a fairly quick recovery for him.”

“Don’t know why this had to happen. And not going to lie it hurts. But all we can do now is Trust in God and attack every single day over and over again. Thank you Chiefs kingdom for always supporting me and for everyone who has reached out and sent prayers. I Will be back stronger than ever ⏰”

Kansas City Chiefs quarterback Patrick Mahomes suffered a torn ACL in his left knee during Week 15, ending his 2025 season. While any ACL tear is serious, an MRI scan revealed no additional ligament damage, offering hope for a smoother recovery. Mahomes shared an emotional message on social media, thanking fans and teammates and promising: “I will be back stronger than ever.” Chiefs head coach Andy Reid echoed optimism, saying if surgery goes well, Mahomes could experience a relatively quick recovery.The injury occurred late in the game as Mahomes was moving in the pocket, a non-contact play that resulted in the ACL tear. He immediately signaled to the sideline and was helped off the field, drawing concern from teammates, coaches, and fans alike. The Chiefs quickly assessed the situation and confirmed that Mahomes would undergo further evaluation before a surgical procedure.After the game, an MRI scan showed no major damage to other knee ligaments, a positive sign for Mahomes’ long-term recovery. Andy Reid commented:Typically, an ACL tear requires 9–12 months of recovery, but the absence of additional ligament injuries could shorten this timeframe.Medical experts emphasize that rehabilitation and physical therapy will be key to Mahomes’ ability to return to peak performance.Patrick Mahomes addressed the injury on Twitter:His words highlight faith, determination, and gratitude, reassuring fans that he is mentally and spiritually ready to tackle the recovery process.While Patrick Mahomes’ torn ACL is a tough blow, MRI results and his optimistic mindset offer encouragement. Fans can take heart in his faith, gratitude, and determination, while the Chiefs adjust to life without their superstar quarterback. Mahomes’ promise to return stronger than ever makes the road ahead a story of resilience, faith, and hope.Also read - Micah Parsons shares emotional message after ACL tear, reminding fans of strength in the toughest moments
Article Summary: Kansas City Chiefs quarterback Patrick Mahomes suffered a torn ACL in his left knee during Week 15. An MRI scan revealed no additional ligament damage, offering hope for a smoother recovery. Chiefs head coach Andy Reid echoed optimism, saying if surgery goes well, Mahomes could experience a relatively quick recovery.

Article Title: NHL Update: Connor McDavid reacts after Edmonton Oilers trade Stuart Skinner and Brett Kulak
Article Text:
Stuart Skinner and Brett Kulak (Image Via Twitter)

How do Connor McDavid and Kris Knoblauch view Edmonton Oilers’ Goaltending trade?

Edmonton Oilers Trade Skinner + Kulak For Jarry + Poulin Thoughts | Quinn Hughes To Wild

On Saturday, the Edmonton Oilers' locker room was filled with a combination of feelings and expectations as the team prepared for a huge roster change before their game against the Toronto Maple Leafs. The exchange that sent goalie Stuart Skinner and defenseman Brett Kulak to the Pittsburgh Penguins was a drastic change for a team that had trusted both players during their long playoff runs. The names of Connor McDavid , Kris Knoblauch, Tristan Jarry, and Spencer Stastney were soon among the top talks of Edmonton, looking ahead to the future. The trade marked an emotional shift ahead of Edmonton's next chapter.The move was meant to tackle the goalkeeping issues, but the human aspect of the decision could not be overlooked. Skinner had been with the Oilers for parts of six seasons and had helped the team reach the Stanley Cup Finals twice in a row. Kulak was also a dependable player on the defense. After the morning skate, McDavid talked about how hard the moment was, and he made it clear that the loss of the familiar faces weighed on the team, even as they were getting ready for a new chapter.Connor McDavid called the trade a tough decision that the team had to make, and at the same time pointed to the positive side of the situation by saying how much the group would miss Skinner and Kulak.Head Coach Kris Knoblauch was equally supportive, stating that both players had been very dependable over the years, contributing not only on but also off the ice. Another ex-Oilers defenseman, Troy Stecher, who now plays for Toronto, offered his insight into the situation, too. He referred to the trade as part of the business and wished his ex-colleagues nothing but the best in their new home, Pittsburgh. Their reactions highlighted mutual respect and a smooth transition for all involved.The focus was then directed towards the newly recruited players. Knoblauch showed trust in Tristan Jarry and mentioned his experience and the good results he had in the past, despite a hard previous season. Jarry, who got the call against Toronto, shared that the last day and a half had been full of emotions but added that getting to play with superstars like McDavid and Leon Draisaitl was a thrill. At the same time, the rapid development of Spencer Stastney, who has been skating and moving the puck well, caught the coaching staff's attention, as they believed that such a skill would bring the team more balance.The Oilers are taking change with a careful and optimistic attitude. The loss of reliable teammates is painful, but Edmonton is convinced that this kind of change will help the team to be better and thus to navigate through the season.Also Read: NHL Injury Update: Evgeni Malkin sidelined as Pittsburgh Penguins face playoff pressure
Article Summary: Edmonton Oilers traded goalie Stuart Skinner and defenseman Brett Kulak to the Pittsburgh Penguins. Skinner had been with the Oilers for parts of six seasons and had helped the team reach the Stanley Cup Finals twice in a row. Connor McDavid called the trade a tough decision that the team had to make, but pointed to the positive side of the situation.

Article Title: Why isn’t Seth Curry playing tonight? Stephen Curry’s brother still searching for a steady role with the Golden State Warriors
Article Text:
Seth Curry wont be playing tonight (Image via NBA)

Golden State Warriors coach Steve Kerr explains Seth Curry’s limited role as the team continue to adjust their rotation

Ayesha Curry shows support as Seth Curry shares emotional message after Warriors debut

Seth Curry, the brother of Golden State Warriors legend Stephen Curry, has been waiting to join the team for a long time. Given his talent in shooting, Curry was seen to be a smart addition at the start of the month. However, as of now, he hasn't gotten the minutes he probably hoped for.The announcement was made about two weeks after junior Curry made his Golden State Warriors debut along with his brother. This was a very emotional occasion after Seth Curry's difficult career. Ayesha Curry , his sister-in-law and businesswoman, knew this all too well. She told him how happy she was with Seth Curry's fantastic Warriors debut and had a very important message for him.In an attempt to improve its offence, the Golden State Warriors signed Seth Curry to join Stephen Curry. Since joining the legendary team on December 1, Curry has only played in two games, which may indicate that Steve Kerr doesn't view the 35-year-old as a regular rotational player.Curry has participated in most of the Warriors' recent games despite dealing with a couple of injuries. Meanwhile, Kerr doesn't feel comfortable giving him a bigger role on his underperforming Western Conference team.Kerr recently clarified why the Warriors' early-December signee didn't play in the game after Curry's match against the Minnesota Timberwolves on Friday. He said:“It’s not easy to just throw guys in there randomly after they haven’t been in the rotation in the first three-quarters. He’s definitely going to help us at times, but this wasn’t his night, and we went in another direction.”After the quad injury of Stephen Curry, Seth stepped up and scored 14 points in a nearly flawless performance with 6-of-7 shooting, including two shots from beyond the arc. The Warriors re-signed Curry on a one-year contract Monday after he split with them just before camp. He debuted in front of his home crowd the next day.Curry ignored the 112-124 loss. The guard expressed his strong emotions about playing in the Bay in an Instagram post. He wrote in the caption:“Felt Like Home! Thankful to be back out there on the big stage."Seth's heartfelt remark was shared on Instagram by Ayesha. After that, she sent a heartfelt message and wrote:“Very exciting! Very well deserved. Very cool. Let’s gooooo @sdotcurry @calliecurry Whole fam locked in.”While the NBA 's top 3-point shooter recovers, Seth Curry's presence gives the Warriors another offensive option.Also read: Ayesha Curry celebrates brother-in-law Seth Curry’s emotional Golden State Warriors comeback with touching message
Article Summary: Seth Curry made his Golden State Warriors debut on December 1. He scored 14 points in a nearly flawless performance with 6-of-7 shooting, including two shots from beyond the arc. The Warriors re-signed Curry on a one-year contract Monday after he split with them just before camp. He debuted in front of his home crowd the next day.

Article Title: Bills star Josh Allen glows while discussing dad-to-be journey after Hailee Steinfeld’s pregnancy news: "It’s not that crazy to me"
Article Text:
Josh Allen breaks silence on becoming a father as Hailee Steinfeld’s pregnancy sparks fan frenzy (Getty Images)

Josh Allen’s smile says it all as he embraces fatherhood after Hailee Steinfeld’s pregnancy news



Buffalo’s comeback win in Foxborough delivered more than standings drama. It revealed a quarterback carrying two powerful motivations at once. On a cold Sunday night, Josh Allen stood in the glow of a 35-31 rally, fielding questions that had nothing to do with coverages or cadence. His answers were steady, warm, and deeply personal. The scoreboard mattered. So did the moment unfolding off the field, one that has quietly reshaped his life.The Bills kept control of their season by denying New England an AFC East clinch. Yet the scene afterward felt different. Allen was relaxed, almost glowing, as he spoke about a future far bigger than football. With a ring on his finger and a child on the way, the league’s reigning MVP sounded grounded, grateful, and ready for what comes next.Josh Allen did not hide how much the support meant to him after he and Hailee Steinfeld shared their news. He explained that the surprise had already settled in long before the public announcement. “I’ve known for a long time, so it’s not that crazy to me,” Allen said. What caught him off guard was the wave of messages, including notes from teammates and familiar faces. “But obviously the love I’ve received from teammates and friends — you know it’s a really cool, special moment in my life and my wife’s.”That balance between private joy and public attention has defined the couple’s approach. Steinfeld revealed the pregnancy through her Beau Society newsletter, framing it as part of a birthday reflection. “As I step into my 29th year as a softer, stronger version of myself, I want to appreciate some of my favorite moments from this year, both big and small,” she wrote. “29. This video…” The clip showed her baby bump and a sweater that read “mother,” simple and intimate by design.Their story has unfolded steadily. First photographed together in May 2023, they built a relationship away from noise. Allen proposed in Malibu last November, under roses beside the water. Friends close to them have long suggested this path felt natural. “They both are excited about starting a family and want that in the next few years,” an insider said. “They both share the same values when it comes to parenting and having kids. ”On the field, Allen remains relentless. He threw three touchdowns, ran with purpose, and tied Matthew Stafford for the most offensive scores in the league this season. Off it, he sounded just as fulfilled. He called Steinfeld “my favorite teammate,” a line that carried weight. With Cleveland up next and Buffalo surging, Allen appears to be leading with clarity, confidence, and a heart full of anticipation.Also Read: Alix Earle turns breakup tears into tropical glow-up, sends subtle message after Braxton Berrios split revelation
Article Summary: Josh Allen and Hailee Steinfeld are expecting their first child. The Bills quarterback revealed the news after a 35-31 win over the Patriots. He said he and Steinfeld have known for a long time that she was pregnant. Allen called Steinfeld ‘my favorite teammate’

Article Title: Who is Mallika Sagar? Meet the woman set to conduct the IPL 2026 auction
Article Text:
Mallika Sagar (X)

IPL mini auction: Lot of interest for Cam Green | Wait ends for Prithvi Shaw, Sarfaraz Khan?

Mallika Sagar will be a familiar and significant presence when the IPL 2026 auction unfolds on Tuesday, December 16. For many fans, her presence in the room has become part of the modern IPL auction experience. Yet behind that composed exterior lies a journey that is both unusual and groundbreaking.Born in Mumbai in 1975, Sagar has built a rare career that bridges two traditionally exclusive worlds — fine art and elite sports auctions. Raised in a business-minded household, her fascination with auctioneering began unexpectedly, sparked by a book that featured a woman auctioneer as its protagonist. That early inspiration eventually set her on a path few in India had walked before.Sagar’s academic journey took her from Mumbai to Connecticut, before she graduated with a degree in Art History from Bryn Mawr College in Philadelphia. In 2001, she began her professional career at Sotheby’s London, developing deep expertise in Indian and South Asian art. Her rise was swift and historic. At the age of 26, she became Christie’s first Indian woman auctioneer in New York, specialising in modern and contemporary Indian art — a landmark achievement that established her credibility on the global auction circuit.After gaining years of international experience, Sagar returned to Mumbai and worked closely with renowned institutions such as Pundole’s Art Gallery. Her success in the art world laid the groundwork for a seamless transition into sports auctions, where her clarity, precision and authority quickly stood out.The turning point came in 2021 when she was appointed the first female auctioneer in the Pro Kabaddi League , breaking another long-standing barrier in a male-dominated space. Two years later, she was entrusted with conducting the inaugural Women’s Premier League auction, further cementing her growing influence in Indian sport.She subsequently conducted the IPL 2024 mini-auction and the high-profile IPL 2025 mega auction held in Jeddah, Saudi Arabia.In 2025, Sagar added yet another milestone by leading the WPL 2026 auction, reinforcing her status as one of the most trusted and accomplished auctioneers in the sport.
Article Summary: Mallika Sagar will be a familiar and significant presence when the IPL 2026 auction unfolds on Tuesday, December 16. For many fans, her presence in the room has become part of the modern IPL auction experience. Yet behind that composed exterior lies a journey that is both unusual and groundbreaking.

Article Title: “Not the time”: Travis Kelce’s silence after Chargers loss adds another chapter to a frustrating Chiefs collapse
Article Text:
Travis Kelce (via Getty Images)

Travis Kelce 's media silence puts leadership and league rules under scrutiny

Kansas City did not just lose a game on Sunday night, as it also lost its grip on the story around the season. The recent narrow defeat to the Los Angeles Chargers ended playoff hopes, raising questions about Patrick Mahomes ’ health, and reopened a conversation the Chiefs would rather avoid. As Arrowhead slowly emptied, attention drifted away from the scoreboard and toward leadership, accountability, and how veterans respond when everything unravels.For a franchise accustomed to deep January runs, this moment felt unfamiliar and uncomfortable. The disappointment was heavy, the mood tense, and patience thinner than it has been in years. In that setting, every decision carried weight, including who chose to speak and who chose not to.Travis Kelce’s choice to bypass postgame interviews became a focal point almost immediately. When approached by reporters, the veteran tight end offered only a brief explanation before walking away. His only response was “It’s not the time. I’ll catch you guys during the week,” per The Athletic’s Jesse Newell. That response may have felt human in the moment, but it co nfl icted with a clear NFL requirement.According to Mike Florio of Pro Football Talk, “All players (except those in the concussion protocol) are required by the NFL to speak to reporters after every game.”That rule exists to maintain transparency and consistency, especially after high-profile games. Kelce’s silence was not viewed in isolation either. Earlier this season, he made a similar decision following a loss to Houston. The league declined to issue a fine then, a move that looked more like patience than approval.What complicates matters is the larger context, as this Chiefs roster has shown its age at times, and Kelce’s own season reflects that shift. While his seven catches for 70 yards against the Chargers were solid, they lacked the game-changing spark fans have come to expect. On his New Heights podcast, Kelce acknowledged that struggle openly, stating, “You put in all this ... work and hope that it pays off. This year, I just can’t find them. ”That honesty resonated, but it arrived away from the locker room spotlight. With Mahomes injured and the season over, leaders are judged not only by performance but by presence. Kelce’s media silence risks becoming a symbol of a year that slipped away quietly, leaving the NFL to decide whether grace will be extended again.Also read: Taylor Swift’s Eras tour has a hidden Joe Alwyn connection amid her engagement to Travis Kelce
Article Summary: Travis Kelce's decision to bypass postgame interviews became a focal point. The NFL requires players to speak to reporters after every game. Kelce’s media silence risks becoming a symbol of a year that slipped away quietly, leaving the NFL to decide whether grace will be extended again.

Article Title: “Never take it for granted” - JJ Redick issues bold statement backing LeBron James after Los Angeles Lakers edge Phoenix Suns
Article Text:
Image via getty

JJ Redick analyzes Los Angeles Lakers’ win over Phoenix Suns during the last minutes

JJ Redick PostGame Interview | Los Angeles Lakers vs Phoenix Suns

JJ Redick reflects on LeBron James and Dillon Brooks ’ on-court exchange

Also Read

The Los Angeles Lakers managed to rack up another win. It was a close one against the Phoenix Suns. Especially during the fourth quarter, when the Lakers were almost about to waste the 9-point lead they had racked up by the end of the third quarter. The Suns led the fourth quarter, racking up 37 points. However, LeBron James played a crucial role towards the end with his last-minute impressive free throws. Appreciating his effort, JJ Redick issued a bold statement during a post-game interview supporting the NBA legend.The Lakers coach, JJ Redick, appreciated the athlete and other members of the team who added to the team’s final standing. Players like Jarred Vanderbilt and Deandre Ayton each played a vital role in leading the Lakers to their victory. The coach acknowledged the teamwork and issued a supportive statement during the post-game interview. While he realizes that it was a tough and messy fight towards the end, the coach believes that such games reflect on the team’s on-court hard work. He particularly uses the word growth that is necessary among the players of the team.JJ Redick has always been appreciative of the team’s coordination and on-court hard-fought wins.The Los Angeles Lakers’ recent game against the Phoenix Suns was one such game. While the Lakers secured a 9-point lead towards the end of the 3rd quarter, they were on the verge of losing it all during the fourth quarter. The Suns added 37 points in that quarter, which brought down the lead gap between the two teams. LeBron James, however, with his last-minute free throws, managed to keep the lead intact and led the team to its victory.When asked about his opinion on the game, Redick admitted that the team did commit mistakes. However, the mistakes did not stop them from racking up the win. He appreciated players like Jarred Vanderbilt and Deandre Ayton for their continuous effort throughout the game. Despite the late struggle faced by the team, Redick continued to appreciate the team. He stated, “Winning ugly is actually really fun because it means you got in the trenches and fought. It’s about growth, not perfection.” Appreciating LeBron’s role in making the team win, the coach further added, “I never take it for granted. He puts his fingerprints on the game every night, and tonight was no different.”LeBron James got involved in a heated exchange with Dillon Brooks. It was during the Los Angeles Lakers and the Phoenix Suns game. During the third quarter, Dillon laid out an attack as LeBron stayed strong on defense. Even though Luka Doncic committed the foul, the play did not end. Dillon played the ball towards LeBron and it hit the NBA legend. LeBron got furious and it took the coach and other players to calm him down.When JJ was asked about this during the post-game interview, he stated, “Our group was unaffected by it.” Redick instead praised the legend for maintaining his cool and carrying out the game for the rest of the match. It seems like the legend’s age is not letting him stop his game and shall continue to do so for the rest of the season.
Article Summary: The Los Angeles Lakers managed to rack up another win against the Phoenix Suns. LeBron James played a crucial role towards the end with his last-minute impressive free throws. Lakers coach, JJ Redick, appreciated the athlete and other members of the team who added to the team’s final standing.

Article Title: Quinn Hughes feels at home in Minnesota Wild, signals to continue with the team for long term
Article Text:
Canucks search for next leader after Quinn Hughes’ departure (Image via Getty Images)

Quinn Hughes expresses his heartfelt gratitude after receiving a warm welcome from the Minnesota Wild

Bruins vs. Wild | NHL Highlights | December 14, 2025

Also read:

As Vancouver Canucks star Quinn Hughes was traded to the Minnesota Wild on Thursday, reports suggest that the move has started on a highly positive note, both on and off the ice. Just two days after he entered the club, Hughes was embraced into the club with an overwhelming welcome.Hughes was cheered from the moment he skated out for warm-ups. Each time he touched the puck, the crowd roared with applause. The reception made the player feel at home, that would go a long way in instilling confidence and convincing Hughes to make Minnesota his permanent home.Quinn Hughes, who won the 2024 Norris Trophy as a defenseman in a blockbuster trade from Vancouver, admitted that he was overwhelmed with the reception and did not expect an emotional response so quickly from the fans and the team.Hughes has recently became the fastest player in franchise history to record 300 assists. He also secured 400 career points and finished with 76 points in 68 games, earning another Norris Trophy nomination.Quinn Hughes was traded to the Wild after Canucks’ star defenseman was traded to the Minnesota Wild on December 12, 2025. In return, Vancouver received two young players, Marco Rossi, Liam Ohgren, defenseman Zeev Buium, and a first-round draft pick in 2026.However, after he joined the club, the former Vancouver star received a warm welcome from the team and his fans during the match against the Boston Bruins on Sunday.The player expressed his gratitude for embracing him with open hearts. Speaking about the club, he stated, "That was pretty special, honestly. I wasn’t expecting that. It was very cool. I know it’s a hockey market, but that was exciting."Hughes further stated, "I mean, extremely open-minded. They have an amazing core. I’ve only been here four hours, but getting to know some of the guys and how energetic and positive some of the guys are. And then Minnesota being so close to Michigan (where Hughes grew up) and the state of hockey and the passion here. Just seeing how the fans reacted to me as well in warm-ups. And then obviously, I have a lot of time for Billy for 'sacking up' and making the deal as he did and how he valued me. "According to reports, Quinn Hughes’ contract carried a $7.85 million cap hit through the 2026–27 season, which factored heavily into the discussions leading up to the trade. Besides, Hughes himself recognized the emotional aspect of this transition but remained focused on the game.However, for the Minnesota Wild, Quinn Hughes’ trade will provide the team with a massive boost, bolster their defense, and enhance their playoff prospects.
Article Summary: Quinn Hughes was traded to the Minnesota Wild on December 12, 2025. Former Vancouver Canucks star received a warm welcome from the team and his fans. Hughes admitted that he was overwhelmed with the reception and did not expect an emotional response so quickly from the fans and team.

Article Title: Olivia Culpo reveals her go to Christmas gift for Christian McCaffrey’s teammates’ WAGs
Article Text:

What is Olivia Culpo's go-to gift for Christmas?

First Christmas as parents brings a shift in perspective

As the holiday season draws closer, Olivia Culpo is holding on to a cherished NFL tradition, even as her life off the field enters a new phase. The model and entrepreneur, who married San Francisco 49ers star Christian McCaffrey in 2024, has revealed her go-to Christmas gift for her husband’s teammates’ partners, offering fans a rare look into the close-knit world of NFL WAGs.Despite becoming a first-time mother earlier this year, Culpo has made sure her annual festive ritual remains unchanged.Culpo shared in an exclusive interview with People that every Christmas, she sends pecan pies to the wives and girlfriends of McCaffrey’s 49ers teammates, a tradition she has quietly maintained over the years. While the gesture may seem simple, it has become something her circle has come to expect during the holidays.She admitted that while she doesn’t bake the pies herself, she makes sure they come from trusted professionals and are shipped with care. The focus, she explained, is on consistency and thoughtfulness rather than perfection.This year’s celebrations carry extra emotional weight for Culpo and McCaffrey. In July, the couple welcomed their daughter, Colette Annalise, making this their first Christmas as parents.Culpo has openly spoken about how motherhood has changed her outlook, especially at home. Once particular about keeping things spotless, she now finds joy in the small messes that come with raising a baby. According to her, a lived-in space feels warmer, more authentic, and better aligned with the holiday spirit.Alongside the pies, Culpo is also gifting items from her recent collaboration with Abercrombie & Fitch. The NFL-inspired collection draws from vintage athleisure and is designed for women who want stylish yet comfortable game-day wear.Including pieces from her own line adds a personal touch, particularly for women who share the unique rhythms of life during an NFL season.While Culpo continues to expand her career off the field with fashion ventures and an upcoming Netflix food competition show, McCaffrey remains central to the 49ers’ offense as they push through a crucial stretch of the season.Yet, amid the pressures of professional football, Culpo’s Christmas tradition stands out for its simplicity. The annual pies symbolize connection, familiarity, and community values that often remain behind the scenes in the NFL spotlight.As another season heads toward its climax, Culpo’s holiday ritual is a reminder that for many inside the league, Christmas is less about spectacle and more about shared moments off the field.
Article Summary: Olivia Culpo is gifting pecan pies to the wives and girlfriends of Christian McCaffrey's 49ers teammates. The San Francisco 49ers star married Culpo in 2024. The couple welcomed their first child, Colette Annalise, in July.

Article Title: Dak Prescott has a surprisingly realistic response to Cowboys’ shaky playoff fate
Article Text:
Dak Prescott adresses Cowboys' playoff fate. Source: X

Dak Prescott says he will not give up till the Cowboys have a firm answer

The Dallas Cowboys lost 34–26 to the Minnesota Vikings on Sunday, which casts doubt over their postseason hopes. Their chances of reaching the playoffs now stand at just 1 per cent. Dallas can only qualify if they win its final three games, while the Eagles would need to lose all of theirs. It’s technically possible, but fans widely believe it’s unrealistic for them to have their hopes up.Quarterback Dak Prescott also had a novel reaction to their situation and did not sugarcoat his feelings about the team’s performance.“Unfortunately, I’m sure the playoffs are out of the picture,” Prescott said recently. “... You can’t just give up. You can’t just stop. You can’t just say, ‘Oh, we’re not going to the playoffs.’ It’s the National Football League. I just saw a team Thursday night that’s not going to the playoffs beat a good team and knock them out.However, Dak made sure to assure fans that he will only put his best foot forward. “Nothing’s going to change for me, and that’s going to be my influence as a leader. My message to anybody around me is take pride in who you are as a man and who you are as a football player and the job responsibility that you have and what that entails is giving your best every day.And if you don’t, you probably won’t be in this league for long,” he said.The Dallas Cowboys’ playoff hopes are now hanging by a thread. After a 34–26 loss to the Vikings, their chances of reaching the postseason have dropped to under 2%, according to NFL.com. If the Cowboys do miss out, it will mark a second straight year without a playoff appearance.
Article Summary: Dak Prescott says he will not give up till the Cowboys have a firm answer. The Cowboys lost 34–26 to the Minnesota Vikings on Sunday. Their chances of reaching the playoffs now stand at just 1 per cent. Dallas can only qualify if they win its final three games, while the Eagles would need to lose all of theirs.

Article Title: Sri Lanka to arrest 1996 ODI World Cup-winning captain Arjuna Ranatunga; here’s why
Article Text:
Arjuna Ranatunga. (Photo/social media)

Franchise boom vs Test cricket: Tom Moody’s honest take

NEW DELHI: Sri Lankan authorities are planning to arrest the country's former men's cricket team captain, Arjuna Ranatunga , on corruption charges linked to his tenure as the petroleum minister, a court was told on Monday.The 1996 ODI World Cup-winning cricketer Ranatunga and his brother are accused of altering the procedure for awarding long-term oil procurement contracts and instead making spot purchases at much higher prices, according to a corruption watchdog."The total loss to the state from 27 purchases is 800 million rupees," the Commission to Investigate Allegations of Bribery or Corruption told the court, as reported by news agency AFP. The amount was equivalent to over $5 million at the time the deals were made in 2017.The commission told Colombo Magistrate Asanga Bodaragama that Arjuna Ranatunga was currently abroad and would be arrested upon his return to the country.His elder brother, Dhammika Ranatunga, who was chairman of the state-run Ceylon Petroleum Corporation at the time, was arrested on Monday and later released on bail.The magistrate imposed a travel ban on Dhammika, who holds dual citizenship of Sri Lanka and the United States.The next hearing in the case is scheduled for March 13.Arjuna Ranatunga, 62, captained Sri Lanka to victory in the 1996 Cricket World Cup, defeating Australia in the final.The case involving the Ranatunga brothers is part of a broader crackdown by the government of Sri Lankan President Anura Kumara Dissanayake, who came to power last year after pledging to act against corruption.Another brother, Prasanna Ranatunga, a former tourism minister, was arrested last month in connection with an insurance fraud case. That matter is pending.Prasanna Ranatunga had earlier been convicted in June 2022 for extorting money from a businessman and is currently serving a two-year suspended prison sentence.
Article Summary: Arjuna Ranatunga, 62, captained Sri Lanka to victory in the 1996 Cricket World Cup. He is accused of altering the procedure for awarding long-term oil procurement contracts and instead making spot purchases at much higher prices. The case is part of a broader crackdown by the government of Sri Lankan President Anura Kumara Dissanayake.
